titleStmt.title: SII 17.695: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 695. (A.R. No. 639 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of date, i.e., Viśvāvasu, Mithuna 10, Monday and Rōhiṇi are irregular. The cyclic year Viśvāvasu falls in Ś. 1287 (1365-66 A.D.).

This inscription records the gift of land as sarvamānya for lamp to the deities Tiruvālīśvaramuḍaiya nayiṉār and Bhairava Nayiṉār in Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kuṉṟavattanakōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

Below the inscription is another fragment in characters of about the 12th century. It cites the 6th regnal year of a certain king (name lost) and seems to record a gift given by the Nāṭṭavar of Niṉṟaiyūrnāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalicura Irāyairāya Irāya paramecura virapiratāpa kumārakampaṇa Uṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa vicuvāvacu varuṣattu mituṉaṉāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum rohiṇiyum peṟṟa ṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭala
ttuk kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu niṉṟaiyaṉāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālicuramuṭaiya nayiṉārkkum vairava nayiṉārkkum caṉtirātittavarai caṟuvamāṉiyamāka tiruviḷakkukku viṭṭa kuḻi veṭṭai viccātarak koṉāṉ Appakoṇum ka

tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu niṉṟaiyūr
ṭuttaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiye kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumāka kuṭuttaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiye Ittaṉmam canti
vomākavum Ippaṭikku niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu nāṭavarom paṇiyāl cittirameḻiveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 17.695 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
